task_description: Fix handler reordering code in the SMMWay FPC plugin so that callbacks (Настройки button) and commands (/smmway) work correctly. The reordering logic only handles dict-format handlers but pyTelegramBotAPI 4.x uses Handler objects with attributes.

verification.summary: py_compile and ast.parse both pass. Handler reordering code now correctly handles both dict-style (pyTelegramBotAPI 3.x) and Handler-object-style (pyTelegramBotAPI 4.x) handlers via _get_handler_filter() and _get_handler_fn() helpers.
